# E-file Reviews

> Expert technical reviews of professional e-files and clinical equipment for UK nail technicians and healthcare professionals. Focus on torque safety, vibration control, and white finger prevention. All reviews conducted independently; no compensation influences ratings.

## Reviews

- [Saeyang Marathon 3 Champion (White H200)](https://efilereviews.co.uk/reviews/saeyang-marathon-3-champion-white-h200/): Top-rated industry-standard e-file. Rating 4.8/5. Torque 2.9 Ncm, 30,000 RPM. Available in White, Black, Pink.
- [Saeyang Marathon 3 Professional E-file](https://efilereviews.co.uk/reviews/sample-review/): Clinical-grade brushless e-file. Rating 4.5/5. Torque 4.5 Ncm, 30,000 RPM. NHS certified.
- [Saeyang Marathon Cyclone Vac — Podiatry](https://efilereviews.co.uk/reviews/saeyang-cyclone-vac-podiatry-review/): HEPA dust extraction system for podiatry. Rating 4.7/5. 40,000 RPM, 99.9% particle filtration.
- [Saeyang H35LSP vs SH37LN Handpiece Comparison](https://efilereviews.co.uk/reviews/saeyang-h35lsp-vs-sh37ln-comparison/): Technical comparison of high-torque handpieces. Rating 4.6/5. Both 3.2 Ncm, 35,000 RPM.
- [EXO Runner Up](https://efilereviews.co.uk/reviews/exo-runner-up-review/): Budget-friendly modern alternative. Rating 4.3/5. Torque 2.8 Ncm, matte black design.
